prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a geometric Brownian motion model. We used the current price ($93.12), an estimated annualized volatility of 25% (approximating SCHW's recent volatility), and a daily drift of approximately 0.22% (derived from SCHW's recent 1-month performance of +4.5%). The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal distribution for 20 trading days. The confidence intervals are constructed using standard deviations corresponding to the respective Z-scores. Stock price predictions are inherently uncertain and subject to many unpredictable market factors.
